chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-491 of 2017. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on maintainability of main case. 18.01.2022 Mr. Ghayoor Abbas Shahani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = The policy to make appointment on deceased quota was introduced by the Government of Sindh in September, 2002. The father of the petitioner it is said has died in year 1995. It was much before the introduction of the said policy by the government; therefore, the petitioner’s claim to be appointed in public service on deceased quota is not justified. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
